metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the online-retail-marketplace domain.

bricks.name: Shopper Experience
bricks.description: Shopper-facing discovery, conversion, and post-purchase capabilities.

children.name: Shopping Home & Entry
children.description: Personalized entry surfaces that route shoppers into high-intent categories, replenishment missions, and promotional discovery.

internalModules.title: Home feed composition
internalModules.description: Builds personalized modules, deals, and recency-aware shortcuts.

interfaces.title: Shopping home UI
interfaces.description: Web and app entry surface for shopping sessions.

brickDependencies.description: Uses recommendation candidates and replenishment signals.

children.name: Search, Browse & Facets
children.description: Search, browse, filters, category navigation, and ranking for broad and explicit shopping intent.

internalModules.title: Search index and ranking
internalModules.description: Indexes catalog entities and ranks offer relevance.

interfaces.title: Search UI
interfaces.description: Keyword, browse, and filter shopping surface.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on normalized product attributes and category content.

children.name: AI Shopping Assistant
children.description: Conversational and guided shopping assistance that clarifies product tradeoffs and helps shoppers narrow broad intent.

internalModules.title: Intent interpretation and grounding
internalModules.description: Transforms natural-language shopping questions into catalog-aware comparisons and suggestions.

interfaces.title: Assistant conversation UI
interfaces.description: In-session guided shopping interaction.

brickDependencies.description: Uses ranked catalog results and attribute data.
Uses product content and offer context for grounded assistance.

children.name: Product Detail Experience
children.description: Product detail pages, offer presentation, compatibility guidance, and structured comparison logic.

internalModules.title: Offer and content assembly
internalModules.description: Assembles product content, seller offers, shipping promise, and merchandising context.

interfaces.title: Detail page UI
interfaces.description: Primary product decision surface for shoppers.

brickDependencies.description: Uses reviews and answer signals in purchase decisions.
Uses delivery promise state in final decision-making.

children.name: Reviews, Ratings & Q&A
children.description: Ratings, reviews, question-answer content, and shopper trust feedback loops.

internalModules.title: Review moderation and ranking
internalModules.description: Ranks and moderates review content and quality signals.

interfaces.title: Review surfaces
interfaces.description: Review summaries, filters, and question-answer views.

brickDependencies.description: Uses fraud and abuse controls to defend review integrity.

children.name: Deals, Promotions & Merchandising
children.description: Promotional placements, deal eligibility, badges, and merchandising programs that stimulate conversion.

internalModules.title: Promotion orchestration
internalModules.description: Schedules, validates, and merchandises promotional offers.

interfaces.title: Promotion surfaces
interfaces.description: Deal pages, badging, and offer modules.

brickDependencies.description: Uses price and buyability status to ensure offer quality.

children.name: Cart & Save-for-Later
children.description: Cart state, save-for-later, and basket-building utilities prior to checkout.

internalModules.title: Cart state orchestration
internalModules.description: Maintains line items, availability, and basket promotions.

interfaces.title: Cart UI
interfaces.description: Basket review and purchase staging surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses current price and buyability state.

children.name: Checkout & Payments
children.description: Checkout, payment authorization, address selection, and order placement flow.

internalModules.title: Payment and order placement
internalModules.description: Handles transaction completion and order creation.

interfaces.title: Checkout UI
interfaces.description: Purchase completion surface across web and mobile.

brickDependencies.description: Uses saved addresses, payment methods, and household entitlements.
Uses final delivery options and promise state.

children.name: Order Management & Tracking
children.description: Order history, shipment visibility, exception handling, and delivery event communication.

internalModules.title: Order state timeline
internalModules.description: Tracks order progression and exception states after purchase.

interfaces.title: Orders UI
interfaces.description: Order visibility and tracking surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses network and shipment events to show promise status.

children.name: Delivery Promise & Last Mile
children.description: Promise calculation, carrier routing, last-mile eventing, and shopper-visible delivery commitments.

internalModules.title: Promise calculation engine
internalModules.description: Converts network capacity and inventory into shopper-visible promise windows.

interfaces.title: Promise APIs
interfaces.description: Delivery promise and shipment event interfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses current inventory and node allocation state.
Uses Amazon fulfillment network capabilities.

children.name: Returns, Refunds & Exchanges
children.description: Reverse-logistics workflows, refund handling, exchange logic, and policy-aware issue recovery.

internalModules.title: Reverse-logistics orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates return method, refund state, and item disposition.

interfaces.title: Returns UI
interfaces.description: Self-service return and refund experience.

brickDependencies.description: Escalates complex exceptions into support resolution.
Uses return-abuse and fraud checks.

children.name: Prime Membership & Benefits
children.description: Prime sign-up, membership state, benefit eligibility, and retention-oriented value communication.

internalModules.title: Prime entitlement service
internalModules.description: Maintains membership state and benefit eligibility.

interfaces.title: Prime UI
interfaces.description: Membership, benefit, and renewal surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses account and household-state foundations.

bricks.name: Seller Growth
bricks.description: Seller-facing onboarding, catalog, fulfillment, and advertising capabilities.

children.name: Seller Identity & Onboarding
children.description: Merchant registration, compliance, tax, verification, and account health setup.

internalModules.title: Merchant onboarding workflow
internalModules.description: Guides merchants through registration and verification.

interfaces.title: Seller onboarding UI
interfaces.description: Account setup and compliance workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared account and entitlement primitives.

children.name: Catalog Authoring & Content
children.description: Product content creation, variation logic, compliance attributes, and listing publication.

internalModules.title: Catalog authoring pipeline
internalModules.description: Validates, enriches, and publishes listing content.

interfaces.title: Listing management UI
interfaces.description: Seller listing authoring and maintenance workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses brand rights and ownership controls.

children.name: Brand Protection & Registry
children.description: Brand ownership, counterfeit defense, content control, and enforcement workflows.

internalModules.title: Brand rights and enforcement
internalModules.description: Handles ownership validation and enforcement actions.

interfaces.title: Brand Registry UI
interfaces.description: Brand ownership and abuse-resolution workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses authenticity signals and listing trust controls.

children.name: Pricing & Offer Health
children.description: Price competitiveness, buy box monitoring, offer health, and suppression awareness.

internalModules.title: Offer health monitoring
internalModules.description: Tracks buyability, competitiveness, and suppression issues.

interfaces.title: Offer health UI
interfaces.description: Seller-facing offer competitiveness and buyability console.

brickDependencies.description: Uses performance feedback for commercial prioritization.

children.name: FBA Inbound & Operations
children.description: Inbound planning, receiving, prep compliance, and operational workflow for FBA inventory.

internalModules.title: Inbound orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates shipments into Amazon fulfillment nodes.

interfaces.title: FBA operations UI
interfaces.description: Inbound creation and network handoff workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses replenishment and capacity guidance.

children.name: Inventory Planning & Availability
children.description: Forecasting, replenishment, availability control, and stock-risk management across Amazon and merchant nodes.

internalModules.title: Forecast and replenishment engine
internalModules.description: Predicts availability risks and replenishment needs.

interfaces.title: Inventory planning UI
interfaces.description: Seller-facing stock health and replenishment workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses traffic and sales signals for forecasting.

children.name: Seller-Fulfilled Operations
children.description: Merchant-managed order handling, promise management, shipping eventing, and operational service quality.

internalModules.title: Merchant fulfillment workflow
internalModules.description: Coordinates merchant-side shipment handling and status events.

interfaces.title: Merchant fulfillment UI
interfaces.description: Seller-facing operational workflow for self-fulfilled orders.

brickDependencies.description: Uses promise requirements and event expectations.

children.name: Payouts, Fees & Ledgers
children.description: Seller balances, fee explanation, reserve logic, settlement timing, and billing reconciliation.

internalModules.title: Merchant ledger service
internalModules.description: Tracks charges, reserves, disbursements, and reconciliation state.

interfaces.title: Financial account UI
interfaces.description: Seller-facing payouts, balance, and fee views.

brickDependencies.description: Uses seller identity and compliance state.

children.name: Sponsored Ads & Retail Media
children.description: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display, and related retail-intent ad products.

internalModules.title: Retail media serving and optimization
internalModules.description: Handles campaign delivery, bidding, and placement optimization.

interfaces.title: Ads console UI
interfaces.description: Campaign setup and optimization workflow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses buyability context to avoid poor retail outcomes.
Uses availability context to limit wasted spend.

children.name: DSP Audiences & Programmatic Media
children.description: Audience building, programmatic buying, retargeting, and off-surface media orchestration.

internalModules.title: Audience and programmatic orchestration
internalModules.description: Builds addressable audiences and media controls for DSP workflows.

interfaces.title: DSP workflow UI
interfaces.description: Audience planning and media control surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses advanced measurement and experimentation context.

children.name: Retail Analytics & Reporting
children.description: Operational and commercial reporting across traffic, conversion, sales, inventory, and campaign performance.

internalModules.title: Commerce reporting model
internalModules.description: Builds seller and advertiser-facing performance reporting views.

interfaces.title: Reporting UI
interfaces.description: Operational and commercial analytics surface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared measurement and experiment data.

bricks.name: Marketplace Foundations
bricks.description: Shared identity, trust, intelligence, and integration foundations.

children.name: Identity, Accounts & Entitlements
children.description: Shared account, household, entitlement, and merchant identity platform.

internalModules.title: Account graph and entitlements
internalModules.description: Maintains shopper, seller, and household identity state.

interfaces.title: Identity APIs
interfaces.description: Authenticated account and entitlement interfaces.

children.name: Fraud, Abuse & Policy Controls
children.description: Abuse detection, policy enforcement, account-risk controls, and trust interventions across commerce flows.

internalModules.title: Risk scoring and enforcement
internalModules.description: Scores and enforces abuse, fraud, and policy risks.

interfaces.title: Policy decision APIs
interfaces.description: Trust and risk decisions for dependent workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity state to evaluate risk patterns.

children.name: Authenticity & Listing Trust
children.description: Listing legitimacy, authenticity signals, and trust controls that protect shoppers and brands.

internalModules.title: Listing trust engine
internalModules.description: Scores content legitimacy, brand authorization, and authenticity indicators.

interfaces.title: Trust signal APIs
interfaces.description: Product and offer trust signal interfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses brand-rights and enforcement context.

children.name: Customer Care & Resolution
children.description: Case management, support escalation, policy-guided recovery, and cross-party issue resolution.

internalModules.title: Case orchestration
internalModules.description: Routes and resolves support cases across shopper and seller flows.

interfaces.title: Support UI
interfaces.description: Self-service and assisted support surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses trust and policy rules in resolution workflows.

children.name: Personalization & Recommendations
children.description: Personalized merchandising, replenishment suggestions, and recirculation logic across shopping surfaces.

internalModules.title: Recommendation model serving
internalModules.description: Serves personalized product and category suggestions.

interfaces.title: Recommendation APIs
interfaces.description: Recommendation interfaces for home and detail surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared behavior and experiment signals.

children.name: Commerce Measurement & Experimentation
children.description: Shared measurement, experimentation, incrementality analysis, and decision-support platform across commerce flows.

internalModules.title: Experiment and measurement platform
internalModules.description: Runs experiments and builds shared commerce reporting datasets.

interfaces.title: Measurement APIs
interfaces.description: Experiment, reporting, and causal measurement interfaces.

children.name: Commerce APIs & External Integrations
children.description: APIs and integration surfaces for reporting, partner tooling, and ecosystem commerce workflows.

internalModules.title: Partner integration gateway
internalModules.description: Exposes commerce and reporting workflows to internal and external consumers.

interfaces.title: Partner API gateway
interfaces.description: Programmatic workflow and reporting interfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared measurement outputs for integrations.
